title: Cronos Group Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Cronos reported Q3 2022 consolidated net revenue of $20.9 million, representing 3% increase year-over-year. On constant currency basis, revenue grew 7% to $21.8 million. Gross profit improved significantly to $1.2 million with positive 6% margin versus negative 4% prior year. The company maintained approximately $890 million in cash and short-term investments, positioning as industry leader. Management confirmed on track to hit $20-$25 million cost savings target in 2022 with additional reductions planned for 2023. Canada net revenue declined 2% in constant currency to $13.9 million, pressured by flower category pricing. Israel constant currency revenue surged 98% year-over-year to $7.4 million with patient growth accelerating. U.S. revenue dropped 76% as company realigned away from beauty products. The company emphasized rare cannabinoid development through fermentation technology delivering 99.8% carbon footprint reductions. Spinach brand achieved number one dry flower SKU position nationally in September.
